---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new profile, diagnostic, transport, or CLI behavior
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

A one- or two-sentence description of the feature.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? Which client, MCP server, or workflow does
it unblock? If you have a concrete example (a schema that currently fails
to project, a client that is not yet detected, a transport that is not
supported), describe it here.

For a client/profile compatibility request, include current primary vendor
documentation or a reproducible client observation when available. Clearly
separate documented vendor behavior from an inferred compatibility heuristic.

## Current behavior

What Nyanform does today. If applicable, paste the relevant diagnostic
output or the projected schema.

## Proposed behavior

What you would like Nyanform to do instead. Be specific about:

- Which command or option is affected.
- What the new output, projection, or diagnostic would look like.
- Whether this is a new profile, a new diagnostic code, an override to
  an existing profile, or a CLI/transport change.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you considered, and why they did not work.

## Additional context

Links to MCP specification sections, client documentation, or related
issues.

Do not include credentials, private schemas, or exploitable vulnerability
details in a public feature request.
